JURY TRIAL SET FOR FEB-10-2022 CONTINUED TO OCT-03-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 220 FOR JURY TRIAL. THE COURT ORDERS COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER ON THE FOLLOWING JOINT TIME ESTIMATES; MOTIONS IN LIMINE (COUNSEL TO PREPARE BINDER WITH MOTIONS AND OPPOSITIONS (ONLY MOTIONS COUNSEL CANNOT AGREE ON)); EXHIBITS; VERDICT FORM; QUESTIONNAIRE; COURT TRIAL OR JURY TRIAL; JOINT JURY INSTRUCTIONS; AND AUDIO/VIDEO/IT TECH. COUNSEL TO CONTACT COURT'S MEDIATION CALENDAR OFFICER ELIZABETH KELBER. COUNSEL TO NOTICE THE COURT WITH MSC DATE, AND IF THE PARTIES TO PROCEED WITH COURT OR JURY TRIAL VIA EMAIL BY MARCH 21, 2022. COUNSEL TO PREPARE PRE-TRIAL ORDER FROM TODAY'S HEARING AND SUBMIT SAID ORDER TO THE COURT VIA EMAIL AT DEPARTMENT220@SFTC.ORG AND JSENGMANY@SFTC.ORG, JUDGE: HONORABLE KATHLEEN KELLY; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED.
